title: Deputy Prime Minister & Minister of Education, Youth and Sport  |  Vice-Chairman, Supreme National Economic Council

leader.name: Hang Chuon Naron
leader.position: Deputy Prime Minister & Minister of Education, Youth and Sport
leader.purpose: Mental model schema mapping decision-making architecture across 7 dimensions Born 1962. PhD in International Economics (Moscow State Institute of International Relations, 1991). LLM (Royal University of Law and Economics / Lyon 2). PhD in Education Administration (Chulalongkorn University, Thailand, 2018). Secretary of State of Economy and Finance 2004–2013. Minister of Education since 2013. Has implemented Cambodia's most sustained reform programme of the sample — anti-cheating exams, curriculum reform, Education Strategic Plan 2024–2028.

growth_theory.assessed_position: Naron's growth theory is human capital first. As Vice-Chairman of the Supreme National Economic Council, he sits at the intersection of education and economic strategy and has argued consistently that Cambodia's growth cannot be sustained without a workforce that can operate in a knowledge economy. risk_tolerance.assessed_position: Naron's anti-cheating examination reform is the clearest evidence of risk tolerance in his record. The 2014–2016 anti-cheating crackdown caused national pass rates to plummet, triggered political pressure from families, and generated media controversy — he held the policy regardless, creating a significant short-term political cost for a long-term credibility gain. This is the highest-evidence ris
subfields: Assessment: MEDIUM-HIGH — Willing to take on institutional reform; political risks managed carefully

time_horizon.assessed_position: Human capital investments are by nature long-horizon — a student entering grade 4 in 2025 enters the labour market in 2035–2040. Naron has been in his position since 2013 — the only member of this cohort with a 12-year track record in the same portfolio, which itself reveals a long-horizon orientation (education ministers who plan short-term rotate faster). subfields: Revealed: 10–20 years (human capital investment)  |  Operational: 4 years (ESP 2024-2028)

dependency_assumptions.assessed_position: 1. Teacher salary increases are politically funded: Naron explicitly raised teacher salary inadequacy as a constraint — if teachers cannot live on their salaries, they teach in private schools, which undermines the public system. global_positioning_logic.assessed_position: Naron engages with SEA-PLM (ASEAN learning assessment programme), UNESCO, UNICEF, and international research institutions as a matter of routine policy practice — not for diplomatic optics, but for comparative data and technical assistance. His participation in the 2025 ASEAN Ministerial Roundtable on foundational learning and the Foundational Learning Forum reflects a genuine orientation toward i
subfields: Theory: Education quality as international credibility and economic graduation signal

Overall: SECOND HIGHEST consistency score after Serey and Siphana. 12-year tenure with demonstrable reform outputs is the strongest evidence base in the sample. Primary gap: his agenda requires fiscal and political support from others — teacher salaries, STEM lab funding, vocational infrastructure — which are not in his control.
